item.title: Integrating i18n in Docusaurus
item.content:encoded:
This feature was completed through collaboration between Claude and GPT in VSCode Copilot.

i18n is a way to internationalize a website so users in different regions can get a better browsing experience.
Docusaurus already has built-in i18n support, and the overall process is not complicated. There are three core tasks:

  • Declare locale settings in docusaurus.config.js
  • Generate and maintain translation resources under the i18n directory
  • Add extra adaptation for custom React components and custom pages

This time, I migrated my blog from a single-language setup to a dual-language setup: zh-Hans + en. The default language is Chinese, and you can switch to English via the language dropdown. Here is the full process :)

Update docusaurus.config.js​

Update the i18n field like this:

i18n: {
	defaultLocale: 'zh-Hans',
	locales: ['zh-Hans', 'en'],
	localeConfigs: {
		'zh-Hans': {
			label: '简体中文',
			htmlLang: 'zh-Hans',
		},
		en: {
			label: 'English',
			htmlLang: 'en-GB',
		},
	},
}

You also need to add a localeDropdown item in the navbar for language switching:

{
	type: 'localeDropdown',
	position: 'right',
}

Run commands to create the i18n directories​

Run these commands in your project first:

yarn write-translations --locale zh-Hans
yarn write-translations --locale en
info

The locale code used after --locale can be found on this site: https://www.unicode.org/cldr/charts/48/supplemental/language_plural_rules.html

After running them, directories like this will be generated:

i18n/
	zh-Hans/
		docusaurus-theme-classic/
		docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/
	en/
		docusaurus-theme-classic/
		docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/

These mainly include two categories:

  • Translation JSON files for built-in Docusaurus theme text
  • Localized content directories for docs, blog, and pages

If you only need basic UI internationalization, editing JSON is enough. But if you want full translation for docs, blog posts, and standalone pages, you also need to create translated md/mdx files.

I translated all Chinese content on my site into English, and that was a bit tedious 😢

Translate markdown files in docs, blog, and pages​

In Docusaurus, pages created with markdown are in:

  • docs/ for documentation
  • blog/ for blog posts
  • src/pages/ for standalone pages

You can copy files and translate them into corresponding language versions. For example:

  • English docs content goes to:
i18n/en/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/current/
  • English blog content goes to:
i18n/en/docusaurus-plugin-content-blog/
  • English pages content goes to:
i18n/en/docusaurus-plugin-content-pages/

This approach has very direct benefits:

  • Chinese and English content are fully separated
  • Each document can be maintained independently
  • No need to mix two languages in a single file

But the downside is also obvious: as content grows, maintenance cost increases. If you have a lot of image assets, page loading speed may also be affected.

I do not have that much content yet, so free GitHub hosting should still be enough for now.

Translate built-in website text​

Docusaurus generates JSON translation files for many built-in texts, such as the footer, pagination, nav labels, and blog list text.

For example:

i18n/zh-Hans/docusaurus-theme-classic/footer.json
i18n/en/docusaurus-theme-classic/footer.json

This part is suitable for translating:

  • Navigation text
  • Footer text
  • Built-in button text
  • Default prompts like blog pagination and tag pages

There is one maintenance detail to watch out for:

Content that changes over time, like copyright year, should not be hardcoded in i18n JSON. A better way is to generate it dynamically in docusaurus.config.js, for example:

copyright: `
	<small>Copyright © 2025 - ${new Date().getFullYear()} Xingshi Blog ...</small>
`

This way it updates automatically every year, and you do not have to maintain multiple JSON files for it.

How to internationalize custom React components​

If your pages use custom React components, they will not be internationalized automatically by Docusaurus, so you need to handle them yourself.

The most common approach is to use:

  • <Translate>: good for inline JSX text
  • translate(): good for button text and string variables

For example, in a homepage banner:

import Translate, {translate} from '@docusaurus/Translate';

btnText: translate({id: 'homepage.banner.btnText', message: 'About me'})

heading: (
	<>
		<Translate id="homepage.banner.greeting">你好！我是</Translate>
		<span>
			<Translate id="homepage.banner.xingshi">星矢</Translate>
		</span>
	</>
)

This pattern works well for UI-oriented text such as homepage copy, card titles, and button labels.

Extra: handling multilingual links in React-built pages​

I ran into an issue here, so here is a quick summary:

If homepage button/card links are hardcoded as /about, /blog, or /docs/intro, clicking them in the English locale can jump back to Chinese pages.

For example, when you are under /en, you want /en/about instead of /about.

In this case, you can read the current locale via useDocusaurusContext() and build paths based on whether it is the default locale:

import useDocusaurusContext from '@docusaurus/useDocusaurusContext';

const {i18n: {currentLocale, defaultLocale}} = useDocusaurusContext();
const localizedUrl = (path) =>
	currentLocale === defaultLocale ? path : `/${currentLocale}${path}`;

Then use it in buttons or cards:

<a href={localizedUrl('/about')}>About</a>

This is very important, especially on a homepage with many custom components. Header and footer are managed by Docusaurus and usually switch language correctly.

But if custom links are not handled, locale context breaks. You may read English content, click one button, and suddenly land on Chinese content.

Make the comment system switch language too​

My site uses the giscus comment system, and I also linked its language to the current locale.

Implementation is simple:

const {i18n: {currentLocale}} = useDocusaurusContext();
const giscusLang = currentLocale === 'zh-Hans' ? 'zh-CN' : 'en';

Then pass it to giscus:

<Giscus lang={giscusLang} />

This way, Chinese posts show a Chinese comment UI and English posts show an English comment UI, making the experience much more consistent.

Show comments only on post detail pages​

This was one of my own earlier pitfalls -_-

In a previous post, I described building comments with giscus. At that time, I mounted CommentSystem outside BlogPostItem, which caused:

  • Comment section appears on post detail pages
  • Comment section also renders on blog list item cards

Later I could hide comments on list pages with CSS, but that is still "render first, hide later," which is not elegant.

A better approach is to swizzle BlogPostPage and place the comment component directly in the post detail page layout:

<BlogPostItem>{children}</BlogPostItem>

{(nextItem || prevItem) && (
	<BlogPostPaginator nextItem={nextItem} prevItem={prevItem} />
)}

<CommentSystem />

Then the structure becomes:

  • Post content
  • Previous / next post navigation
  • Comment section

And blog list pages, tag pages, and author pages will no longer render the comment component, which is cleaner logically.

Notes for local development​

Default command:

yarn start

This starts the default locale, which is the Chinese site.

If you want to debug only the English environment directly, use:

yarn start:en

This is very useful for debugging English routes. Otherwise, switching via the language dropdown may throw errors and look like a code issue, while the real reason is that development mode can only run one locale at a time.

Suggestions for internationalization​

If your content is small, manual maintenance is fine. As content grows, AI suggested:

  • Manage UI text with Translate and JSON
  • Maintain full docs/blog/pages content in separate files per language
  • Do not hardcode shared variables in translation JSON, such as year, links, or site name
  • Always handle locale prefixes in links inside custom components

In short:

UI text belongs to i18n JSON, content text belongs to language-specific directories, and custom logic belongs in React components.

Summary​

After integrating i18n into this Docusaurus blog, my overall impression is:

  • Official support is already quite complete
  • UI-level internationalization cost is not high
  • The time-consuming part is content translation and custom component adaptation

If you only need a bilingual Chinese-English blog, this Docusaurus solution is already sufficient. If I continue improving it, possible directions include:

  • Translation automation workflow
  • Multilingual SEO details
  • Further localization for comments, page metadata, and social cards

This part was suggested by AI. What I currently need is a workflow where I write one blog post locally, translate it into English automatically, then push and deploy online.

After adding comments and internationalization, this site is gradually becoming a real, complete website. Next step is to integrate algolia search. Right now, I am using Google https://www.google.com/search?q=site%3Axingshi.blog with domain restriction to search my own site, but no content shows up. I do not think I blocked indexing, so I need to investigate further.

Reference​

https://docusaurus.io/docs/i18n/tutorial

https://www.unicode.org/cldr/charts/48/supplemental/language_plural_rules.html

https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Internationalization

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Language_localisation

item.title: Giscus comment system build in Docusaurus
item.content:encoded:
A comment system for giscus built on Github's Discussions under Docusaurus

Install giscus APP in GitHub. This APP is built based on Github's GitHub Discussions

Compared with the traditional use of GitHub Issues to make comments, giscus stores comments in the Discussion of the warehouse, making the hierarchy of the warehouse clearer.
For example, when there are bugs or new requirements in the warehouse, you can raise an Issue, and when there are comments on a blog website, they are stored in Discussion in the warehouse. Separating Issues and Discussions makes it easier to manage and view, and Discussion also has a similar meaning to comments. When used as a comment system, it is clearer and more convenient to use.

Install the giscus React package in the project root directory

Because Docusaurus is built based on React, you need to install the React giscus package

yarn add @giscus/react

According to the steps of giscus official website, fill in the warehouse address and Discussion partition (the author of giscus recommends using the announcements partition to ensure subsequent maintainability), and then repo-id and category-id will be automatically generated. Copy this code

Create a comment component in the src/components/Comments/index.js directory

Because it is a React project, the above code may not be usable. You need to refer to another warehouse of giscus format. To change the format, remove the data- attribute and build the elements of the comments system in the form of components.

In this directory src/theme/BlogPostItem.js, add a comment component to the bottom of the article on the blog post page.

Reference:

https://giscus.app/

https://github.com/giscus/giscus

https://github.com/giscus/giscus-component

https://docusaurus.io/docs/swizzling#wrapping

Here is the comment test:

item.title: Front-end positions thinking 2026-02-18
item.content:encoded:
I just searched Nanfu International Station Official Website and I feel like I have some thoughts about front-end development and my current future career plan. I might write something.

I have been working for more than a year now, and I have a clearer understanding of my favorite job position. It seems that what I like is not the traditional interface of transmitting data to the backend, and using the UI framework to build a cookie-cutter front-end page of the backend management system.

What I like more is an exquisite website that is interactive and has good aesthetics. I have been involved in the customized development of e-commerce independent websites in my work for more than a year. I have come into contact with many aesthetically pleasing and highly interactive websites. I personally prefer this type of website.

I feel that the website front-end of the backend management platform is a bit boring, but if you want to learn technology, it is estimated that the traditional front-end will improve the technology more. Let’s lay a solid foundation first. Mainstream frameworks such as React Vue are definitely indispensable.

In addition, try to improve yourself, or get closer to the front-end development engineer who focuses on front-end pages, and try to learn some visual front-end technologies such as Canvas, svg animation, threeJS, WebGL, etc., as well as some design-related knowledge that you may come into contact with.

If you are looking for a job in the future, you should still think about finding a position that can build an interesting website. I feel that being able to build an aesthetic online website will give me a full sense of accomplishment.

item.title: 2026 Chunwan think
item.content:encoded:
I watched the 2026 CCTV Spring Festival Gala last night, and I felt deeply about it. It was full of technology and fancy dances, but it also extended some thoughts. Let’s go into details about AI (artificial intelligence) and robots.

Spring Festival Gala, a New Year's Eve 8:00 pm prime time broadcast on the CCTV platform, a variety of art forms intertwined together to bring joy to the people at the same time also promote the traditional Chinese culture; AI, Artificial intelligence acronym for artificial intelligence, in recent years, a very hot technology, the proper use of which can help people to enhance work efficiency Save Repetitive physical labor

This year's (2026) Spring Festival Gala, when watching the first is to feel a sense of science and technology full of it: byte jumping company's volcano engine to provide cloud computing to collaborate to complete the Spring Festival Gala program some complex animation effects, the four robotics companies (Song Yan Power Yu Shu Technology Magic Power Galaxy General) deep into the Spring Festival Gala program Embodying the achievements of China's robotics field, highlighting China's scientific and technological strength in the increasing, in addition, many countries or regions to turn the Spring Festival Gala program, the Chinese government has been the first time in the past few years. In addition, the broadcasting of the Spring Festival Gala in many countries and regions also reflects that China's voice in the world is increasing, and traditional Chinese culture is being publicized and accepted around the world.

Secondly, naturally feel a little bad experience it, I do not know when to start CCTV Spring Festival Gala pursuit is no longer a "joy" of the pronouns, but is to highlight our scientific and technological hard power Propaganda of China's traditional culture of a medium, more beautiful picture but at the same time there is less of a little " core" it, this year's Spring Festival Gala is also reflected in many countries or regions to broadcast our country in the world discourse is increasingly enhanced, Chinese traditional culture is being publicized and accepted around the world. In this year's Spring Festival Gala, I remember two sketches: one reflecting some of the short-video platform's shortcomings, the video platform's algorithmic recommendation mechanism, which pushes the content people are interested in and makes them dependent on it, and extending some of the realities of the problem of stirring up the male-female dichotomy and so on; and the other reflecting the problems of grass-roots social governance. --Some civil servants are "all talk and no action".

The other thing that's a bit awkward is that there are a lot of advertisements interspersed with each program. I personally don't dislike advertisements in the program, after all, it costs a huge amount of money to support such an influential program, but with the names of the sponsors added to each program, does it affect people's viewing experience? And plus some robotics programs and a little too much, a kind of robotics companies in the "annual meeting" to summarize the past year's development of the feeling, so I feel that this Spring Festival Gala experience is not very good.

I'm not sure if the content of the two sketches described above matches my own understanding, but I'm probably also affected by cell phones. The popularity of smart phones has made the traditional TV medium to get information a thing of the past, and I can feel the dependence on my cell phone, so I can't watch the Spring Festival Gala without looking at my cell phone to "suffer". "I can't read the program on my cell phone, so I can't read the program on my cell phone, so I can't read the program on my cell phone, so I can't read the program on my cell phone.

I feel that the current Spring Festival Gala and the previous Spring Festival Gala when I was a child, compared to the Spring Festival Gala, there is also a slight difference between it, when I was a child Spring Festival Gala people will get together to discuss this year's Spring Festival Gala in the interesting programs, and now very few people will go to the Spring Festival Gala to discuss a certain program program is arranged whether it is good to the Instead, more for the Spring Festival Gala trolling a year worse than the year's feelings. Personally feel that the reason for this problem is multi-faceted, shallow think about it, probably because before when smart phones are not very popular entertainment equipment is limited on New Year's Eve, people will sit around the TV to watch the Spring Festival Gala, so before the Spring Festival Gala program scheduling more is how to let the audience go to get a better viewing experience more is how to do a few more interesting programs. But now with the continuous development of science and technology, the types of entertainment equipment has become more and more cell phone convenience gradually replaced the role of the TV TV ratings in the year-on-year reduction, so the production of the Spring Festival Gala program is also thus a little change it, from the previous to the joy of the main, and gradually to the promotion of traditional Chinese culture in the window of the world to publicize the Chinese to change, so that the Spring Festival Gala's popularity is also increasingly down! But as for the national level One more medium to publicize the country's traditional culture, why not one more way to show our cultural self-confidence, so we can only comment on the matter This thing to see, there is no absolute right, of course, there will not be absolute wrong, to be relative to the view!

As for AI, the development of artificial intelligence in the past few years is really very rapid, I remember the end of 2022, a foreign AI ChatGPT released when it caused a lot of impact, but at that time the AI is still only a simple dialog generate text form to show, but only three years more time, now go to see the AI, whether it is domestic or foreign AI Although it may be a little flawed, but it is already a text, but it's not the same, it's not the same, it's not the same. AI, both domestic and foreign AI, although it may still be a bit flawed, but are already text-to-diagram, text-to-writing and even text-to-video functions are very perfect. Now AI is no longer a simple tool, but to the development of AI assistant, can go to get your computer or cell phone permissions to help you do some complex things, such as the PC side of the zero to get some reference documents to write a paper, the mobile side of the access to APP permissions to break down the barriers to help you intelligently go to the purchase of the product and place an order or order a takeaway! The progress of artificial intelligence technology also brings a lot of risks and challenges, excessive use of AI may lead to data leakage in some industries, resulting in the leakage of people's information by the bad guys, as well as the replacement of some jobs by intelligent robots, leading to unemployment, which may result in a bad social impact, or to say that we need to make good use of AI, but should not rely on AI too much to prevent bringing undesirable negative feedback.

Summarize, by the Spring Festival Gala and refracted out on the back of the progress of science and technology is also obvious, such as robots on the Spring Festival Gala in the last year, but also need to be assisted on stage, this year's robots have been able to go to the stage on their own and to complete some complex actions. In addition, although the current Spring Festival Gala program is a little flawed may indeed be too much advertising implantation in the middle of too much robot-related pages, but more clear picture quality more sophisticated animation and choreography more "foreigners" began to pay attention to the Spring Festival Gala, which is not a kind of progress of the Spring Festival Gala is not a way of reflecting China's hard power of culture. It's a way to show the hard power of China's culture.

I hope that the next Spring Festival Gala will be more innovative and interesting at the same time! I hope the next Spring Festival Gala will be innovative and at the same time more interesting!

Original:

https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/3z8VLBu7-gZ2ooF9HZ6aTA

item.title: HDL think
item.content:encoded:
I packed up my computer today and saw an article about the Contra game written by a high school student. I felt a little touched. Let’s write something.

I suddenly realized that I haven’t played games for a long time. Since I started working, it’s probably because I’m busy at work. When I have free time during the workday, I will go to Bilibili to watch videos, browse Tiktok, or read WeChat public account articles. During my free days, I have been working on my own blog website or visiting relatives’ houses. Now there are no games on my mobile phone, let alone the computer. I remember that the only game left was when I was in college. The more popular hybrid version of Plants vs. Zombies. I haven’t paid attention to it for a long time. The numerical value is weird. It’s hard to pass every level without cheating. It’s different from the previous classic version of Plants vs. Zombies.

When I saw that article, I remembered that the college entrance examination was about to take place. In order to "kick Internet addiction" to prepare for the college entrance examination, I uninstalled all the games on my mobile phone at that time. In fact, it was nothing. After all, in high school, to be honest, I didn't study seriously. Afterwards, I took the college entrance examination. It was natural. But now that I can work and be engaged in the industry I like, I am a little lucky.

The game "Contra: Return" probably originated in 2017. I played Contra when I was a child. I remember that I had a game CD at home and plugged in the game controller to play it. Later, when a mobile game came out, I quickly registered it. It is probably the game I have played for the longest time. It was a nurturing game. I was busy with school at the time. I didn’t have much time to play. I logged in and played for some time during the winter and summer vacations of junior high school and high school. I think I should really pick it up when I go to college. I am no longer so busy with studies, and I have time to do tasks every day. I also received my favorite weapons, Shenglong and Dragon Cannon, but my fate with it ended there.

I remember that when I went to Qingdao in May 24, I deleted the game because my mobile phone had no memory to take photos. It has been almost two years in the blink of an eye. In fact, there is still a lot of reluctance to let go. I remember the Xinghai Competition on Monday night at 8 o'clock, the legion competition on Tuesday and Thursday, the "Fighting Aliens" on Wednesday, etc. I have almost forgotten the specific legion tasks, but I remember that in addition to going to class every day, Basically, I was tinkering with Contra. I really love this game, but after I got a little money in my pocket, I discovered that the outside world is actually much more interesting than the mobile phone. I can encounter all kinds of interesting things, meet all kinds of people, and see different beautiful scenery in different places. Suddenly I realized that the saying "the world is so big, I want to see it" seems to be reasonable. This virtual world can certainly kill time and bring fun, but how can the people or things encountered in the real world not be fun?

In fact, I have been working at this job for more than a year. To be honest, my hobbies seem to be limited to walking around on my days off and doing things I like and want to do. Or should I cultivate a meaningful interest? Of course, coding is one of them. I hope to continue to maintain it, and then write more interesting and meaningful articles to broaden my technology stack.

The fate of gaming is probably close, after all, I haven’t played gaming for more than a year.

item.title: Summary for 2025
item.description: Time flies so fast, and in the blink of an eye, this year is coming to an end. This year is a dull year without causing any ripples, but it is also a year with some unforgettable moments. Let me summarize this year:
item.content:encoded:
Time flies so fast, and in the blink of an eye, this year is coming to an end. This year is a dull year without causing any ripples, but it is also a year with some unforgettable moments. Let me summarize this year:

I spent most of this year in Tianjin. It was also the first time that I lived alone in a strange city. It was quite an unforgettable year. On the first day of this year, I went to Century Bell Square in Tianjin. It was my first time to join in such a crowd of people. In addition to the atmosphere and liveliness, the most profound feeling was that people follow the crowd. There are really many people! The stretch from the South Square of Tianjin Station to the Century Clock is packed with people. In fact, it’s not that interesting at all. It’s just that people get together and count down to tens and shout Happy New Year. But this experience is still very satisfying. It’s really lively when there are so many people.

In the following days, because I was no longer a student and did not have the long vacations I had when I was a student, I spent most of my time on my days off. I went shopping in some places and visited many scenic spots in Tianjin: Century Clock, Jiefang Bridge, Jinwan Square, Eye of Tianjin, Ancient Culture Street, Fifth Avenue, Binjiang Road, Jiefang North Road, and Xiaobailou. I basically walked around the city, but maybe I haven’t eaten enough yet. I have only eaten: gaba dishes, pancakes and fruits, Bazhen tofu, HuangMenLiangYang, shaved ice, and some unique Tianjin dishes that I have not tried yet.

In addition, I also went to Binhai, looked at the sea in Tianjin, went to Jinghai County, ate Duliu Hechao, a local dish unique to Tianjin, and went to Jinnan District to meet friends for a few meals, watch a movie, and take a Haihe River cruise with friends. It was a very emotional boating experience.

Of course, Tianjin also has some regrets. Every district in Tianjin has not been visited yet. When you have time to return to this city, you should go for a stroll. Climb the winding mountains of Ji County and visit Dongli, Xiqing, Beichen, Baodi, Ninghe, and Wuqing districts. When you come to a new city, in addition to the urban area, you still like to visit its districts and counties to experience the different customs and customs of each region.

In addition, I went back to Weifang in June, got a diploma, and attended the school’s graduation ceremony. I also graduated. It went by so fast. From now on, I will lose my identity as a student, meet the society, and try to be an adult!

In September, I went to Beijing for two days and visited several museums and gift shops, as well as Tiananmen Square and the Great Hall of the People. These two places I often see on TV were visited in person.

I wish the motherland will become stronger

Going to this city also makes me realize my own insignificance, especially when I go around the "Big Pants" area. There is an indescribable feeling in this area. It's better to improve yourself!

This is probably the case in terms of life. In terms of material things, I didn’t make much money, but the focus is on experience. I learned some new things during this year of solitude. I think I learned some new things about life and social knowledge that cannot be taught on campus. At least now I have no problem cooking for myself. Home-cooked meals are not delicious at all, but let’s make a living. I also tried to cook a more troublesome Tianjin dish: NaiQuanBao. Preparing the ingredients really took up a lot of time. I spent a long time shopping at the morning market to buy all the ingredients.

Everything is fine at work, but I just need to learn more new technologies. At present, the technologies I know are basically qualified for the job, but there are some things I don't know, such as complex js logic, which may be a bit difficult to write by myself. It needs the assistance of AI. In addition, I still have to try to learn some frameworks vue and react. The three major components of native development are of course easy to use, but it is also because of their foundation that few companies use the three major components of native development now. Let's think about improving efficiency. Learn some complicated things and broaden your technology stack.

This year is probably like this. I no longer have the leisure time of walking around as a student. Most of my time is spent at work. If I have time on my days off, I will basically go out for a walk to gain knowledge and kill time.

In the new year, I hope you can still maintain an optimistic and positive attitude and spend every day happily!

Also, make a small wish, and have a small savings at the end of the year.

then

I hope it can happen

console.log('End');

Original:

https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/iLJjpirMta4WiD-a1QpJjg

item.title: Autumn
item.description: Autumn has not yet arrived, and winter is getting stronger. This year’s autumn feels like it has come and gone quickly. The most impressive thing is that it rained for nearly half a month in October. One autumn rain and one cold. This year’s autumn has not encountered the crisp autumn weather, and I have begun to feel the leaves are falling and yellowing, with a feeling of desolation, sadness and coldness. It will be the beginning of winter in a few days. This autumn is passing so fast.
item.content:encoded:
Autumn has not yet arrived, and winter is getting stronger. This year’s autumn feels like it has come and gone quickly. The most impressive thing is that it rained for nearly half a month in October. One autumn rain and one cold. This year’s autumn has not encountered the crisp autumn weather, and I have begun to feel the leaves are falling and yellowing, with a feeling of desolation, sadness and coldness. It will be the beginning of winter in a few days. This autumn is passing so fast.

The blooming flowers in spring are full of vitality, the heat of summer and the coolness of evening have all been experienced, but autumn is coming to an end, and I haven’t felt the strong autumn feeling yet, but when I look up and look out the window at the gradually withered leaves - it turns out that autumn has already quietly arrived, and I certainly have some feelings about autumn.

Autumn is the season of harvest, and the air is crisp. This season is the same as spring. There is neither the heat of summer nor the cold of winter. It can be regarded as two relatively beautiful seasons in a year. Most of the autumn in student days is spent on campus. Along with the knowledge learned, it dissipates in the mind. It is only in the past two years that I gradually have some memories of autumn. It is probably after I started working that I had my own space to think about some things independently. Last autumn was still in the training stage, so I lived a happy life. Freedom At the same time, I am also learning skills. This autumn, I have been working for nearly a year in a blink of an eye. Time flies, but I also leave some images on my phone. I look through the photo album on my phone. Every photo and video has its own meaning. Each photo and each video together outlines my impression of autumn. A season with the joy of harvest but also bleakness and coldness. A season that has inherited the heat of summer and is also preparing to welcome the cold season of winter.

Time flies, and I have spent twenty-one spring and autumn years in the blink of an eye. The mark of time is engraved on my body. The ignorant child I once was has wandered in a strange city, got a job of my choice, and started to work hard for my future. With the footsteps of the years and the cool breeze of autumn, we are heading towards our own future together.

item.title: Add a bit cold
item.content:encoded:
I ended my day's work tonight and shut down my computer. When I walked to the kitchen to prepare for cooking, I felt a cold breeze blowing over my body. I looked at the weather on my phone and saw that the temperature had reached 20 degrees. I was already feeling a little chilly wearing half-sleeves and shorts. It turned out that summer was over and autumn was coming.

At this time last year, I was still immersed in free time - completing practical training tasks in the school's training base. At that time, it was just ordinary. Now looking back, it was really an unforgettable experience. From Monday to Friday, I was just learning some skills I like (of course, without the constraints of the teacher) Most of the time may be spent "catching fish" (hhh). On Saturdays and Sundays, I am more casual. I usually ride a bicycle to the surrounding markets to buy some fruits, and then go to Jialejia (a large local supermarket chain in Weifang City) in the city or district to buy some bread and milk for breakfast. It is quite a good memory.

A year has passed. After all, I have been working for almost a year. Time flies so fast. This year’s life is like a calm surface of water. It is calm, but there will be ripples from time to time. I look through the photo album on my phone. This year I basically spent walking in the city of Tianjin. Because I work in this city, I have nothing to do on Saturdays and Sundays. I finish my housework. I would go out for a stroll. I was already familiar with the Haihe River. I walked from the Eye of Tianjin to the Jiefang Bridge and felt the beautiful scenery along the Haihe River and the unique bridges.

On New Year's Day, I experienced the New Year's Eve atmosphere, it was crowded, that's all // face covering

I went to see the Five Avenues in spring. Thousands of flowers bloomed and there was a huge flow of people. While admiring the flowers, I also went people-watching hahh~

I went to see the sea in Tianjin. Maybe it is because it is adjacent to the inland sea of Bohai Sea. I feel that the scenery is a little less beautiful than that of Yanweiqing in the province. But if the weather is good, the scenery is also very beautiful.

In addition, the most common things on my mobile phone are photos of my own cooking. I have become proficient in making simple stir-fries. Of course, home-cooked meals may not taste very good. Just focus on eating them // Dog Head

At this point, the action is almost over. I originally wanted to write a high-level article using gorgeous words, but the "dialect" came up when I wrote it. Maybe the more prosaic the language, the more empathy I can create!

console.log('End')

Original:

https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/arsDro9Q046s0zTqd5FxIw

item.title: Leave school one year
item.content:encoded:
It’s been a long time since I calmed down and typed an article seriously. Let me sum it up. The past year - from the days when I walked out of campus to now, has passed so fast! A year has passed in the blink of an eye - leaving the hotbed of campus and entering the "shackles" of society. I have experienced some things this year. Although they are not big things, I have also learned some things and gained some knowledge. I have also grown a lot. Let's talk about it in detail :)

In July last year, I officially walked out of campus and started a year of practical training. During the internship phase, first came the practical training phase. The first training unit I found was a bit unpleasant. It was not very satisfactory in Qingdao. I stayed there for a month and said bye.

The days after that I returned to Weifang, the city where I went to university, and spent the rest of my training life in the training base set up by the school. There was no pressure at all. It was almost the same as my life in school. I didn't learn much real things. My daily life was the 'work station' of the training. The dormitory was two o'clock and one line. I have to mention it here. It is really inconvenient to eat here. The place is a bit remote. I remember that the breakfast at that time was bread and milk bought from Jialejia during the weekend break. After several months of training, it seems that the training time was quite fulfilling. From Monday to Friday, I studied by myself. I learned the skills I like. On Saturdays and Sundays, I rode my bicycle to watch the days and went to the surrounding markets. I also spent this time happily.

Time has slowly come to December, and I have arrived in my favorite city. I think I have found the right job position that I like - front-end development. Although the technology used may be relatively basic. There are only three major native components plus the liquid template language, but this job has two weekends and statutory holidays. I can do what I want to do, which is quite good when I think about it. In this way, I survived the internship with my boss and became a full-time employee. I plan to continue to work in Tianjin in the future, but the current technology is definitely not in place. I am thinking about learning about the react framework, and then I want to develop a blog website (I had this idea a long time ago. I struggled with technology before, but now the technology is almost the same. Of course, except for the backend, I suffer from no aesthetics//face covering). So I am still thinking about learning something. Let’s take a look. I plan to use react’s docusaurus to generate a website, and then I will change the style based on it and seize the time to develop it. The most important thing is to record your own learning journey.

At this point, I have reviewed the work-related content of the past year, and of course there is a small episode. When I was looking for a job in Jinan in December, several companies in Jinan took the initiative to contact you. It was said that you met the requirements of our company, and then came for an interview. Is that okay? I also went for an interview. It was all the same routine - training loan. The conversation was pretty good at first, but in the end it was said that your skills are not very good and you need to learn more. I will provide you with a venue, you just go and study, and then I will sign a "training loan" contract for you. When you first entered the society, I didn't make any money, so I took out a loan. Anyway, I wouldn't do such a thing, so I left after the interview.

Of course, I can't just think about work, life is the main theme. During the practical training period in Weifang, I had free time. I went to Zibo to have a small barbecue, climbed Yunmen Mountain in Qingzhou, and went to Jinan to visit various scenic spots. I felt that travel is such a thing. There are so many plans. It may not be as good as walking casually on your own and then encountering a scenic spot by chance. Take it easy. That's it. After work. Although work is a weekend break and a statutory holiday, it seems that time is always short. I don’t have that much free time. I just cook my favorite side dishes if I have nothing to do, and go out for a walk if I have nothing to do. Spend every day freely and happily.

I’ve been chatting a lot, so I’ll just write it here. The main task at this stage is to take care of myself first. Make more money. The most important thing is to make yourself happy!

console.log('end')

Original:

https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/NE59wJHHApoaT35iydHgxA

item.title: Summary for 2024
item.content:encoded:
2024 is almost over, so let's summarize the year

Originally wanted to cut the video This is the 31st time is too late to write an article to summarize it, this year for us a little different significance, we are also from the identity of the student metamorphosis into the workplace, although still in the internship is not really the end of the identity of the student, but after all, the work is also considered to be entering the community, right.

Well, to summarize:

Turned over the cell phone album Progress bar pulled to the beginning of the year, to take the hand is driven by their own interest in assembling a computer, the configuration is not high price is not expensive, but the good thing is that the first step behind the ability to set up a better computer when it is skilled.

At the same time is also a hot brain and went to Zibo to eat a number of barbecue, and then went to the Boshan Eat to the authentic Boshan dishes, large, tasty Good, and then to the beginning of this month came to Tianjin to seek employment.

In Weifang, then limited by the lack of suitable transportation to each county and city to turn a whole, that is, by bus, in April to see the cherry blossoms, after the day, went to Fangzi catch the Weifang fair look at the old train station Fangzi witnessed the Jiaoji Railway hundred years of history of the changes of an old fire station it; went to Changle County Originally, it is to rush to his sapphire capital of the title to go, but unfortunately, the sapphire museum is closed, did not see the sapphire museum is closed. Sapphire Museum closed did not see want to see the sapphire, but also strolled Changle a classic car museum, which is full of very old sense of the classic old car It is not in vain it; and then ate to eat towards the sky pot This thing is in fact a burrito and then with a bowl of soup, just came to Weifang when the first time to eat to think that this is a similar hot pot thing it is we are uneducated; and then also went to Qingzhou, the Qingzhou Museum, turn around, turn around the Qingzhou Museum. Turned around the Qingzhou Museum Turned around the ancient city, climbed the mountain, ate breakfast in Qingzhou (water fried buns + bean curd brain) is not bad price affordable also quite delicious; and then it is to go to the cold Pavilion went to the Yangjiabu Grand View Garden inside the kite Weifang to see the kite capital of the origin of kites, the original Yangjiabu not only kites woodblock prints do good, Weifang on the non-heritage culture is still attached importance to; and there are going to the gorge Mountain Weifang City because of the Xiaoshan Reservoir and built a district, riding a bicycle up the Xiaoshan Mountain Mountain is not high but still very tired, but cycling downhill when it is really cool, and then it is riding a bicycle to walk Xiaoshan Reservoir Naijia shared bicycle riding is too tired on the roughly turn around, did not and those riding enthusiasts as a ride around the Xiaoshan Reservoir, but also at this time of the cycling have a little feeling about it, behind the ability to have a small bicycle, to buy a small bicycle. I've got the ability to purchase a small bicycle to go around the place I want to go around.

Only a few counties and cities, Zhucheng, Shouguang, Changyi, Linqu, Gaomi, a few places have not yet gone, this is also considered a bit of a regret of the student era, after the opportunity to strive for the city of Weifang to turn around their alma mater, and turn around a few places did not go to strive to Weifang, the entire city to turn around one of the whole!

And then to the back of the time to go out to sneak around Most of the "Special Forces Tour", a pain in the student era, a shyness, in Qingdao, the popular attractions are basically all around the turn, the said not to say Summer in Qingdao is still very cool summer should be good if you should be good to avoid heat, is to go to the day of the fog did not shoot the three baths that they want to shoot the night scenery left a little regret; in Yantai, also their own way of travel is not the right way it should be by bus or taxi. Bus or taxi, smart choice to rent a car to drive the way of travel, leading to Yantai has a lot of good coastal scenery are suffering from driving a car can not be parked randomly, and did not leave a record of the photographs, self-driving, far away from the attractions can be considered If the attractions are more dense, then still consider renting a small donkey, that thing is really convenient; in Weihai, although it is to see some nice scenery, but also to take some pictures, but maybe it is not a good idea. But maybe the season is not right, as if the winter snow days to Weihai to see the sea is more feeling it, but also in Weihai, the first did not catch the high-speed rail The first time I took a long six hours of the train, back to Weifang when 4:00 or 5:00 in the morning, I remember, riding a small bicycle past the most prosperous place in Weifang - Taihua City, but also to shoot the blues moments it.

July is also out of the door of the school to start a new stage of looking for practical training and internship, but also means that our student status from this moment to the end of it, went to Qingdao, where to stay for a month mixed feelings about it, happy to see a lot of nice scenery, sad is not a sense of belonging to this city where there is a kind of indescribable feeling, coupled with the practical training a little bit unpleasant, but also very quickly slipped away. The back is also back to Weifang in the second city we are familiar with the completion of the practical training stage, but also at this time like to go around, that time every Saturday and Sunday will always ride a small bicycle to catch a market, go to the city, to go to their own want to go to some of the places decided at the time.

There are also words is eleven to go to Jinan where to stay for two days, strolling Jinan's popular attractions, as well as the Standing Committee of the National People's Congress to say that not to say that this place can be casually in and out of is I did not expect, the beginning of this month With the end of the practical training stage, I also began a new stage of job hunting.

To this second half of the year has passed in fact is close to the end of the province cast cast resume Probably the problem of education, or we look for work in the wrong way, a lot of have read not back, shelves Jinan found a few but are training loan set of work, and then decided to look for work to find out of the province to come, Tianjin, a city that we like more I hope to be able to long-term development of the bar in this, to earn some yuan and then return to their hometowns.

The year 2024 is coming to an end, I've been around a few cities, I've gained some insights, I've learned a few things, other than that, I'm a person who can think of something and then execute it, I hope I can be with us for a long time, I'm a young person, I'm a young person, I'm a young person, I don't have any other wishes, I just wish that in the new year, I wish that I can achieve everything I want to achieve, I wish my work can be successful and I can be happy with everything, and that everyone around me can have good health. I wish you all the best, and I wish you a prosperous new year, that's all.

If there is anything else.

I hope to meet a good man soon.

console.log('This article is end')

Original:

https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/BYvsqVJ8VJB55xeab0JpBw

item.title: Summer
item.description: When you think of summer, what comes to your mind?
item.content:encoded:
When you think of summer, what comes to your mind?

It’s the vast sea, the unbearably hot sun, a barbecue with friends gathering together, the feeling of leisurely walking on a path in the evening summer breeze, or many other things.

For me, summer is a season that I yearn for. Compared with winter, which is characterized by snow, spring, which is full of vitality and the revival of all things, golden autumn, October, and autumn when farming is busy, the sea and barbecues in summer are my favorite side. Of course, the dryness of spring, the desolation of autumn, the severe cold of winter, and the heat and rain of summer are some of its shortcomings, but they cannot stop me from loving summer. This is probably because there was a two-month vacation in the summer when I was a student. In summer, there are enough We have more time to chase the sea, drink cold drinks, and do what we want to do, and the days in summer are the longest of the year, which means we have longer time to chase what we want to do, exercise, relax, and enjoy a delicious meal.

Summer is a hot season and also a leisurely season. The heat of the day cannot withstand the coolness of the summer wind in the evening. It cannot stop the leisure time, walking on the field path, blowing the evening breeze, thinking about happiness or some unforgettable things, and it cannot dissipate the happy mood of having a barbecue, drinking a cold drink or beer. The evening breeze blows, with a pleasant mood, and you fall asleep.

item.title: Personal career interest exploration
item.description: An article I wrote a long time ago about what type of work I like
item.content:encoded:
An article I wrote a long time ago about what type of work I like

What I want:
Be healthy, feel happy, have a good job, and have no pressure in life

What I like about my job:
Web front-end engineer, digital media related, video editor, photographer? Office work

What are my hobbies and interests:
Travel, photography? Random ideas and put them into action

Job hope:
It is similar to the kind of job that a company provides technical support to overseas. For example, the company develops a piece of software, and then you help the company sell it, and then help customers solve some problems. You travel every day, satisfying your hobbies of traveling, and at the same time earning money from work.

item.title: About AI speech
item.description: A speech on AI during college, a manuscript written while doing PPT
item.content:encoded:
A speech on AI during college, a manuscript written while doing PPT

Let’s talk about AI

Here is PPT link

First of all, it must be an introduction to the concept​

AI (Artificial Intelligence), the English abbreviation is AI. It is an important driving force for a new round of scientific and technological revolution and industrial change. It is a new technical science that researches and develops theories, methods, technologies and application systems for simulating, extending and expanding human intelligence.

Artificial intelligence has actually always been a technology around us. Maybe ten years ago, it was little known, or it could only be called by name, and I didn’t know what it did.

Love apartment refrigerator clip,

But now, everything from voice assistants on mobile phones to sweeping robots to driverless cars are all within the scope of artificial intelligence technology.

Some application areas:​

In agriculture, the application scenarios of smart agriculture include smart agricultural machinery, smart plant protection, smart irrigation, smart breeding, etc. Using smart technology, agricultural production can be automated, intelligent, and refined, improving agricultural production efficiency, reducing costs, improving the quality and safety of agricultural products, and promoting sustainable agricultural development.

In the financial field, we help you analyze a large amount of user data and display the data visually. Of course, this is not just AI but also includes big data technology. Intelligent finance is the application of artificial intelligence technology in the financial industry. Its development has promoted the digitalization and intelligence of the financial industry. AI can be applied in financial risk management, investment decision-making, credit assessment, customer service, etc., improving the efficiency and accuracy of financial institutions.
For example, AI can analyze large amounts of financial data and market intelligence, predict price fluctuations of stocks, currencies, commodities, bonds, etc., and provide investors with more accurate investment advice and risk control strategies.

Smart homes, sweeping robots, and smart speakers (Xiaodu, Xiaoai Audio) use voice to control the use of lights, curtains, air conditioners, TVs and other furniture in the home.

Smart healthcare is the application of artificial intelligence technology to the medical field, using intelligent technology to solve various problems in the medical field, including medical data analysis, disease diagnosis, drug research and development, health management, etc.

AI is now well known to everyone. I think it is probably because of the popularity of one of its branches, generative AI. At the end of 2022, the artificial intelligence conversational chatbot ChatGPT was launched and quickly became popular on social media. In just 5 days, the number of registered users exceeded 1 million.

info

What is generative AI?

Generative artificial intelligence (GAI) is an artificial intelligence technology that uses complex algorithms, models and rules to learn from large-scale data sets to create new original content. This technology can create various types of content such as text, pictures, sounds, videos and codes, and comprehensively surpasses the data processing and analysis capabilities of traditional software. What is it used for?

For example, Vincent pictures and Vincent videos can help you answer questions in the form of dialogue.

After ChatGPT became popular, major domestic and foreign technology companies, as well as some mobile phone manufacturers, have begun research and development of AI. For example, domestically, Baidu’s Wenxinyiyan, ByteDance (the parent company of TikTok)’s Doubao, foreign ones include Google’s Gemini, and the more famous Claude

Future Outlook​

The development prospects of AI are bright. Correspondingly, there are many more R&D positions related to AI. Some employment positions have been appropriately added. Life has become more and more convenient. For example, with the popularization of autonomous driving, you can free your hands and go wherever you want comfortably.

But even if there are advantages, there are also disadvantages. The continuous development of AI technology will inevitably cause some traditional positions to disappear. For example, in our programmer industry, with the development of generative AI, some "code farmers" may be eliminated.

Risks and challenges faced​

AI is just a tool. Don’t rely too much on AI. It can easily make people lazy and unwilling to make progress. Countries can avoid possible risks by using relevant laws and regulations Using generative AI may cause some data leakage

For example, if practitioners in the financial industry hand over some sensitive data to AI tools, it will cause losses to the company.

item.title: Begin
item.content:encoded:
I had nothing to do, so I registered a public account to record the trivial matters in study, work and life. The trivial things were described in simple words, which is the origin of the name of this public account.

In the age of science and technology, the ways and means of obtaining information have become more and more diverse, and the clutter is becoming more and more fascinating. If you read too much, you will easily be immersed in it, unable to extricate yourself, or lose yourself. With the blessing of big data technology, the video platform's algorithm for recommending videos is calculated in advance. The more you watch, the more videos you like will be recommended to you. If you watch too many videos, you will get bored. I don't like this. I am a person who likes to explore things by myself. If I am interested in a certain topic, I will collect relevant information myself to meet my needs. Watching too many videos will have side effects.

With the continuous development of technology, the time we have to obtain information is continuously reduced. In the era without computers and mobile phones, we may need to read many books to understand a concept. With computers, understanding a concept only requires an article compiled by others, and it takes ten minutes to understand a concept. After the popularity of video platforms, understanding a concept may only require a video of one minute or even dozens of seconds.

It may be influenced by many factors. Recently, I am particularly fond of content that relies on written media. When I get up in the morning, an article on the morning news will help me understand the big and small things that happened yesterday. When I am studying in the classroom, I encounter a learning problem, and the answers to the knowledge are recorded on Baidu. I have nothing to do at night, lying on the bed, or watching videos, or watching what I like. Articles by technical experts, an original article, is a small tool that reflects the author's thoughts. Only by reading it can you understand. This is why I prefer written expressions and the purpose of creating this official account. I hope that I can stick to my original intention and continue to update this official account. This is also a platform to record myself and improve myself.

I am not very talented, my writing style is a bit rusty, I am fond of verbal expression, but my literary talent is not very good.

Thank you for watching, enjoy this

Original:

https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/Tet8u8NXCckLJ5kYQjijCA

item.title: A summary of the mess
item.content:encoded:
A summary of the mess
